title: sisymbrium austriacum proles taraxacifolium

parts: Sisymbrium austriacum proles taraxacifolium has many medicinal parts, such as leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain various bioactive compounds. side_effects: Sisymbrium austriacum proles taraxacifolium can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing vomiting, diarrhea, and stomach cramps due to its emetic properties.
